title: xylocarpus procerus
intro: Xylocarpus procerus, also known as the small mangrove or dwarf black mangrove, is a species of mangrove tree native to the Indo-Pacific region. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial and anti-inflammatory compounds that have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Xylocarpus procerus include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and provide antioxidant properties that can protect against cell damage. Herbal preparations of Xylocarpus procerus, such as extracts and infusions, can be used in traditional medicine to treat a range of ailments, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
